title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 150.130 - Blank licenses, form, issuance
text:
150.130.  Blank licenses, form, issuance. — The clerk of the county commission of each county shall issue as many blank licenses for vendors of goods, wares and merchandise, under the seal of the commission, as the commission shall direct, which license shall be in the following form:
(RSMo 1939 § 11312, A.L. 1945 p. 1838, A.L. 1985 S.B. 21) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10084; 1919 § 13074; 1909 § 11626
